chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5615 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.24921/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 07.03.2025 Mr.Gazain Z. Magsi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Fahim Raza, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Zahid Masood, Chief Commissioner, Inland Revenue, CTO, Karachi and Mr.Rashid Jamali, Commissioner, Inland Revenue Zone-V are present. Statement filed by learned counsel for the respondent (F.B.R) is taken on record and copy of the same supplied to petitioner’s counsel. Pursuant to last order Mr.Zahid Masood, Chief Commissioner, Inland Revenue, CTO, Karachi is present in person and he states that the representation in question has already been decided. In view of foregoing, the petitioner’s counsel states that the petition has become infructuous, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
